trainers.quote: You finally made it to the top! Here in the Master Class, only the strongest come to test their mettle against one another. There's no room here for the slightest mistake, nor a moment's hesitation! And now, you are here to challenge me at the very pinnacle of this revered battleground. As the Tower Tycoon of this treasured place— and as a Trainer with a true love for Pokémon— I shall accept your challenge with all that I have! Now, come! Show me, the Tower Tycoon, what you're really made of!
